name: Necromancer
description: A dark caster who drains life and commands minions. Necromancers wither foes with death coil, summon servants and mend with cure; where a mage is a fragile nuker, the necromancer trades raw spell mana for sturdier health, standing behind its pets and sustaining on stolen life. At level 15 they learn soul rot, a heavy curse that rots a foe's flesh and defences, and at level 30 plague cloud, a roiling AoE that drains the life from every foe in the room, then at level 45 dark empowerment, pouring necrotic power into their minions and allies to sharpen every strike, then at level 60 bone shield, a personal defensive buff that rings the caster in whirling bone shards to turn aside the blows that slip past their minions, and at level 75 doom, the necromancer's first AoE control: a room-wide curse of dread that saps every foe's aim and strength.
